description: Style NoteIf you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better way than with this polo T-shirt from adidas. Engineered to wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, this tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a snug Fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear for a relaxed look.Product DetailsBlack polo T-shirt, has short raglan sleeves, buttoned chest placket, red and white printed adidas 3-Stripe running along the shoulder through the sleeve, engineered with Cimacool technology and red decorative stitch detailMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6', shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
